title: Animated loading screen - Monochrome logo fix
description: Small fix to make it work with the monochrome logo feature.
body:
<center> 
  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eeb1e01d838c02075ecc10642a6878c004068ed_0.webp)

<hr style="border:2px solid gray">

Makes the [Monochrome logo](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Options#:~:text=100%25-,Monochrome%20Logo,-Changes%20the%20Mojang) feature from minecraft work with "[Animated loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/animated-loading-screen)"

**_No longer needed after version 2.1 of [Animated loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/animated-loading-screen)_**


</center>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

**Credits** to the original Author of the mod:
[Cheyao](https://modrinth.com/user/cheyao)

> Also included in my [UI pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/beaglenf404s-ui-pack)

‎ [![BeagleNF404's UI pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbefb94182345e890c2706c785678c855c3327b3.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/beaglenf404s-ui-pack)

</details>
